# Copilot Instructions

## Reports and analysis documents

- When creating a report or analysis Markdown file, include the date in the filename using the format `name-YYYY-MM-DD.md` (e.g. `installer-comparison-2026-04-18.md`).

## Profile versioning

- When modifying any profile file (`DollarSignPROFILE.ps1`, `dotbashrc`, `dotzshrc`), update the `# Version` header using CalVer format `yyyy.M.dHHmm` (e.g. `# Version 2026.4.180945`). The version must reflect the actual date and time of the change.
